/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -I/usr/include/qt5 -std=c++14 -fno-permissive -fvisibility=hidden -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-O1 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now          -Wl,-z,pack-relative-relocs -flto=auto  -Wl,--version-script,/run/media/robin/robinScard/codingStuff/arch-unity7/pkgbuilds/unity-base/hud/src/hud-14.10+17.10.20170619/libhud-client/libhud-client.map -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/hud-client.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libhud-client.so.2 -o libhud-client.so.2.0.0 "CMakeFiles/hud-client.dir/hud-client_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-client.dir/action-muxer.c.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-client.dir/connection.c.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-client.dir/param.c.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-client.dir/query.c.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-client.dir/HudClient.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-client.dir/HudToolbarModel.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-client.dir/enum-types.c.o"  libhud-client-generated.a -lglib-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -ldee-qt5 -lQt5Core -ldee-1.0 -lgthread-2.0 -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -Wl,--no-undefined /usr/lib/libQt5Core.so.5.15.18 -lglib-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -ldee-1.0 -lgthread-2.0 -lgio-2.0
